subject: A personal finance app for young professionals who want to build passive income without day trading
objective: Generate product concepts that stand out from generic budgeting tools
additional_context: The app should educate users, support habit formation, and avoid speculative get-rich-quick behavior.
constraints: No crypto speculation, no individual stock picking, no tax advice, and the strongest concepts must fit a mobile app MVP.
seed_ideas: Dividend tracker, learning quests, portfolio health nudges.
